nodes.name: Buff-bellied warbler
nodes.summary: Buff-bellied warbler（Buff-bellied warbler，学名 Phyllolais pulchella），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联13个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。
locations: 熱帶和亞熱帶旱生闊葉林

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is monotypic within the genus Phyllolais. It is found in Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Kenya, Nigeria, Rwanda, Sudan, Tanzania, and Uganda, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. It is a small, dull coloured warbler found in savanna and acacia woodland
